name: ratan
description: Cyber Cafe Print Automation System - WhatsApp to Printer

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.deploy: npm --prefix frontend run build && pm2 restart all --update-env
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run build && pm2 restart ratan-frontend --update-env
